CustomField.formula: IF( EstSuspendue__c = true, IF(DAY(DATEVALUE(StartDate))<10,'0'+TEXT(DAY(DATEVALUE(StartDate))), TEXT(DAY(DATEVALUE(StartDate)))) +'/'+IF(MONTH(DATEVALUE(StartDate))<10, '0'+TEXT(MONTH(DATEVALUE(StartDate))), TEXT(MONTH(DATEVALUE(StartDate))))+'/'+ TEXT(YEAR(DATEVALUE(StartDate))) + ' ' + LEFT(RIGHT(TEXT(TIMEVALUE(StartDate+(2/24))), 12),5) +' / en re-planification' , IF(DAY(DATEVALUE(StartDate))<10,'0'+TEXT(DAY(DATEVALUE(StartDate))), TEXT(DAY(DATEVALUE(StartDate)))) +'/'+IF(MONTH(DATEVALUE(StartDate))<10, '0'+TEXT(MONTH(DATEVALUE(StartDate))), TEXT(MONTH(DATEVALUE(StartDate))))+'/'+ TEXT(YEAR(DATEVALUE(StartDate))) + ' ' + LEFT(RIGHT(TEXT(TIMEVALUE(StartDate+(2/24))), 12),5) )
CustomField.label: Date de Début
